aeo_readiness.summary: The business has foundational elements for AI visibility but lacks depth in conversational content and authority signals to ensure AI models consistently cite them.
quick_wins: Expand content to include more detailed service explanations and FAQs.
Implement HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks and repairs.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact information, but posts and Q&A sections could be more active.
critical_issues: Q&A section is inactive and lacks engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema despite having FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks.
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of detailed, conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to specific HVAC issues and solutions.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding detailed FAQ content and HowTo guides.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts through media mentions and certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Current content lacks the depth and structure needed for AI models to cite your services.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach enhances your content with conversational FAQs, HowTo guides, and authority signals to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your business.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing ground in AI-driven search results.

email_subject_line: Boost Your AI Visibility: Are You Ready for the Future of HVAC Searches?
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and found exciting opportunities to make your HVAC expertise stand out to AI models.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your content for AI-driven searches and increase your lead generation.
